examples: People feel pinched in their pocketbooks and insecure about their futures.
This report could spur some buying in corn futures when the market opens today.
Watch them as they stand in line at the little squirrel coffee shop, discussing the acorn futures market.
The loss was from bad bets on the direction of European stock index futures.
Commodity futures trade on what parties assume the year-end tally for certain crops will be.
